title: MasterClass Cast Aluminium Casserole Dish, Grey Ombre, 20cm/2.5Litre, Gift Boxed
features: What You'll Get - Small Ombre Grey Casserole Pot with Lid 2.5Litre 2 cm, Lightweight Cast Aluminium which offers all the benefits of cast iron, but is lightweight and easy to handle
Hob to Oven - It heats quickly and evenly in ovens and on hobs, including induction hobs, so its great for braising meat
Robust Non Stick - 2 layers of anti-scratch non stick offer excellent abrasion resistance
Self Basting Lid - Enjoy extra-succulent slow-cooked meats and rich one-pot stews, thanks to its clever moisture-retaining lid
CARE AND USAGE—Always wear oven gloves when using the casserole dish. We recommend handwashing before first use.
description: From the manufacturer Cook with Confidence Experiment, create and accomplish: with outstanding design, premium quality and a passion for food, MasterClass helps you cook with confidence. MasterClass Casserole Dish with Lid MasterClass 2.5L Cast Aluminium Dish is lighter than iron but just as strong. A perfect blend of innovative design and timeless style, this multi-use casserole dish is great for baking and roasting in the oven or slow-cooking and stewing on the hob, including induction. This round casserole pot makes cooking a dream as it enhances heat conduction so your meals cook quicker and more evenly. The self-basting lid keeps all those delicious juices in, without having to constantly check and baste by hand, resulting in flavourful meals. The cast aluminium casserole dish also boasts two layers of premium non-stick and scratch-proof coating for effortless food release and easy cleaning. Just pop it into the dishwasher for the best results. More Information MasterClass Lightweight 2.5 Litre Casserole Dish with Lid - Ombre Grey Self-basting lid included Oven safe up to 200°C (392°F) Stovetop suitable, including induction Capacity: 2.5L (4.5 pints, 85 fl oz) Key Features Easy to handle MasterClass's cast aluminium casseroles are about 70% lighter than typical cast iron alternatives, on average. It also features two sturdy side handles. Hob-to-oven cooking Go from searing meat on the hob to slow cooking in the oven, all with one versatile pot. Cast aluminium heats quickly for fast, even cooking performance. It's safe for all types of hob, including induction. Robust non-stick coating Finished with two layers of a high-performance non-stick coating. It's also extremely scratch resistant, to cope with the rigours of daily use. Safe for all heat sources With its stainless steel base, you can use this casserole dish with all heat sources - including induction, radiant ring, gas, halogen, ceramic and solid plate. It's oven-safe to 200 degrees Celsius (392 degrees Fahrenheit) too. At MasterClass, we love food. Trust MasterClass to elevate your culinary experience - whether you're feeding a family, entertaining to impress, or striving to become the best home chef you can be.
